name: Karen Kujou
description: **Height:** 150 cm A half-British, half-Japanese girl who was Alice's friend back in England. She comes to Japan and enrols in Shinobu's school. Karen is generally a very energetic girl (even more so than Youko). She is very outgoing and not afraid to show her emotions. Karen has mentioned on multiple occasions that she "really really really loves" (大大大好き!) Shinobu, which makes Alice jealous sometimes. She gets along with everybody in her class, even to the point where they would give her lots o

name: Kitasan Black
description: __Height:__ 140 cm (Season 2) / 162 cm (Season 3) __Team:__ Spica An energetic and cheerful young horse girl who loves festivals! But when she's not at one, Kitasan Black has a penchant for helping people: someone having a bit of trouble? She runs over to ease the load. Someone worried about something? She sits and listens to what they have to say. She is a kind girl who is loved by many, but she does have a habit of singing in a loud and belligerent tone.
mediaTitles: Umamusume: Pretty Derby - Beginning of a New Era

name: Misaki Yata
description: __Height:__ 167 cm One of HOMRA's raid captains who goes around riding a skateboard and acts as the group's vanguard. He's impulsive, but he also cares about his comrades very much. Yata is a brash teenager with high self-esteem. He is very brutal, showing no hesitation when bludgeoning his opponents, as well as vulgar and easily irritable, cursing openly towards people when things don't go as well as he'd planned. Nonetheless, he shows respect towards his fellow Homura members, especially Mikot

name: Rizu Ogata
description: **Height:** 143cm Rizu is a genius with math and science but terrible with liberal arts. Rizu is one of the four students that is being tutored by Yuiga in Liberal Arts. She is smart when it comes to Science and Math, but is terrible with liberal arts. She is also terrible at understanding people's feelings and reading the mood of the conversation. She tends to see everything in a logical manner whenever something related to emotions such love and awkwardness arise.

name: Ruti Ragnason
nativeName: ルーティ・ラグナソン
description: Gideon's younger sister, Ruti is blessed with the sign of the 'Hero', she is destined to slay the Demon Lord. This has granted her unimaginable power, yet also inhibits her emotions and very humanity as these are unnecessary for a hero. (Source: Official Site)

name: Kei Nagai
description: Kei Nagai is an Ajin and the main protagonist of the series. Kei was first shown with an academic, serious personality. He is very intelligent and hardworking with ambitions to be a doctor who cures illnesses that don't yet have a cure; specifically to cure his sister Eriko. Despite Kei's lack of emotional investment in others, he seems to have strong personal values that he tries to live by. He demonstrates gratitude for Kaito's help and cares about his welfare. name: Kenjirou Shibasaki
description: A detective in the metropolitan police department. He used to work in the investigations division but now works in the records division. He's a contemporary of the head of the terror incident investigation. He is aloof and lazy, with a reluctance to work, but when push comes to shove and people's lives are in danger he quickly turns into a smart, quick-minded man being able to solve most problems that arise. name: Will Serfort
nativeName: ウィル・セルフォルト
description: __Height:__ 168 cm (5'6") __Race:__ Lyzance Will Serfort is a sixth year student at the Regarden Magical Academy shunned by most students and faculty due to his lack of magical aptitude. To make up for his lack of magic, Will trains his body and swordsmanship in the dungeon.

name: Elf Yamada
description: Yamada Elf is [Izumi Masamune](https://anilist.co/character/121470)'s fellow author and neighbor. ~!Her actual first name is Emily, as she confesses to Masamune during a stroll through the forest that served as the model for the Elven Forest in Emily's debut novel.!~

name: Mu-Won Jin
description: The last descendant of the 4th generation leader of the Northern Heavenly Sect, Kwan-Ho Jin. With his supposed death 10 years ago, he reappears as the 5th generation leader of the Northern Heavenly Sect and given the title "The Northern Blade".

name: Musashi
description: Musashi is a member of the Rocket Gang, more specifically part of a trio with [Kojirou](https://anilist.co/character/3936) and [Nyarth](https://anilist.co/character/3937), that follows [Satoshi](https://anilist.co/character/2473) and his friends around in the Pocket Monsters anime, usually trying to steal Satoshi's [Pikachu](https://anilist.co/character/3891).

name: Sui
description: Sui is a slime that Mukoda took as his second familiar. At the time when he got as a familiar, Sui was just a baby slime but evolved on the third day. ~!Thanks to Hephaestos' blessing, Sui gained the ability to do blacksmithing.!~

name: Batou
description: Batou is nominally the second-in-command of Section 9. Little is known about the strange, large foreigner who has been with Motoko Kusanagi for years. He was once American and served in the Special Forces in South America. His amount of cyborg-ization is variable according to the storyline, from his limbs only up to most of his body, second only to the Major herself. name: Makkachin
description: Makkachin is Victor Nikiforov's pet poodle and constant companion.

name: Izuna Hatsuse
description: __Race:__ Werebeast Izuna Hatsuse is a Werebeast girl and the former ambassador of the Werebeast race to Immanity. After Sora and Shiro forced the werebeasts to join the Commonwealth of Elkia, Izuna was directed by Miko to follow and learn from them. Steph has noted that she actually shares similarities to Sora and Shiro, such as lacking common sense, being arrogant towards others, and being extremely smart and competent at gaming. Being a werewolf, she is weak to silver weapons, but is blessed with resistance against other metals. name: Mithrun
description: __Height:__ 155 cm Mithrun is the captain of the Canaries, an Elf group sent to investigate the dungeon. He was born to a noble family, the House of Kerensil, and has one older brother. He is a male elf who is the head of the group. He has pale hair cut in a short bob. The tips of both his ears have been cut off. Only one of his eyes works. name: Ryouta Suzui
description: __Height:__ 173 cm (5'8") Yumeko’s classmate. Cowardly and poor, he quickly ends up being treated as Meari’s livestock, and is called ‘Pochi’ (a common name for a dog). However, he is saved from this predicament by Yumeko.

name: Sae Chabashira
description: __Height:__ 160 cm The homeroom teacher of the protagonist's class (D). She is originally indifferent to her class, doing almost nothing to help them in the battle between classes, and remains unmotivated for the most part.

name: Wing
description: Wing is a Nen trainer whose main student is Zushi. He meets Gon and Killua at the Celestial Tower. Although in the beginning he refuses to train Gon and Killua, and even lies to them about Nen's purpose, he changes his mind when they reach the 200th floor, as he realizes they could die or be badly injured from nen "initiation". For the next several months he teaches them the basics of Nen, after which he announces they have passed the secret final requirement for being a Hunter. His teacher was

name: Yuuna Yunohana
description: __Height:__ 153 cm (5'0") Yuuna is a ghost who is bound to the Yuragi Inn. She has no recollection of her life when she was alive and asks for Kogarashi's assistance in helping her discover who she was, developing an attachment to him in the process.
mediaTitles: Yuuna and the Haunted Hot Springs

name: Ira Gamagoori
description: Gamagoori Ira is one of Four Kings. He is the Head of the Public Morals Committee. He sworn absolute loyalty to the Student Council President.

name: Kabru

He is a tall-man from Utaya, part of the Western Continent. Kabru typically appears rather laid-back, but he is an extremely socially intelligent, analytical, and calculating man with a strong sense of justice.
